creator: freebsd@sysctl.cz
text:
Created attachment 255851
0001-www-librewolf-update-to-133.0.3.patch

hi,
this is an update librewolf to 133.0.3. I tested in poudriere.
I marked it as broken for arm7.

nobody@141amd64-default:/usr/ports/www/librewolf $ exit
